message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Eurobarometer 73.5 (Nov-Dec 2010)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11064","justification":"Cross-national survey including Turkey; covers political attitudes, trust in institutions, and government-related topics around 2010."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 74.2 (Nov 2010)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11023","justification":"Includes Turkey and measures political behaviour, institutional trust, and perceptions of political systems in 2010."},{"title":"International Social Survey Programme: Citizenship II - ISSP 2014","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12214","justification":"Turkey is included; focuses on political participation, citizenship norms, and attitudes toward government and political institutions in the mid‑2010s."},{"title":"International Social Survey Programme: Role of Government V - ISSP 2016","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12926","justification":"Turkey is part of this ISSP round; examines views on what government should do, trust in government, and evaluations of political institutions (2010s)."},{"title":"International Social Survey Programme: Role of Government IV - ISSP 2006 and 2006-2016 Cumulation","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13727","justification":"Cumulated file for Role of Government modules including 2016; provides cross‑time data for Turkey on government responsibilities and political attitudes across the 2010s."},{"title":"Comparative Study of Electoral Systems (CSES) Module 3 (2006-2011) – Integrated Dataset","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12010","justification":"Contains post‑election survey data including Turkey during the late 2000s–early 2010s on electoral behaviour, party choice, and evaluations of political institutions."},{"title":"Comparative Study of Electoral Systems (CSES) Module 4 (2011-2016) – Integrated Dataset","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13319","justification":"Includes Turkish post‑election survey data in the 2010s, focusing on political behaviour, vote choice, and attitudes toward the political system and government."},{"title":"Comparative Study of Electoral Systems (CSES) Module 5 (2016-2021) – Partial Integrated Dataset","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13977","justification":"Module covering the late 2010s; includes Turkey and provides data on electoral participation, party evaluation, and perceptions of democratic institutions."},{"title":"European Values Study 2008–2017 Longitudinal Data File (EVS 2008 and EVS 2017)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13736","justification":"Turkish samples in 2008 and 2017; enables analysis of changes during the 2010s in political trust, confidence in government, and attitudes toward political institutions."},{"title":"International Social Survey Programme: Social Inequality V - ISSP 2019","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13647","justification":"Includes Turkey in 2019; while core theme is inequality, it contains items on government responsibilities, redistribution, and political attitudes toward state and institutions in Turkey at the end of the 2010s."}]}
